title: Settings
description: The single account-settings row for this user's health app. Exactly one row (seeded at provisioning; the getSettings endpoint find-or-creates it).

weeklyBudgetUsd.description: clinic research spend allowance per week (tier-driven)

acceptedDisclaimer.description: whether the user acknowledged this is not medical advice

pinnedMetrics.description: array of metric kinds the user pins to the dashboard Trends section (e.g. ['weight','resting_hr','sleep_hours']); falls back to a sensible default when empty

notifyChannel.description: where reminder crons deliver: 'in_app' (default) | 'email' | 'telegram'. External channels require the matching server credentials to actually send (graceful no-op otherwise)

notifyEmail.description: destination email for reminders when notifyChannel = 'email'

notifyTelegramChatId.description: Telegram chat id for reminders when notifyChannel = 'telegram'
